---
id: handle-cron-trigger-downgrade
title: "Trigger subscription downgrade job"
description: "Manually triggers the expired-subscription downgrade cron job. Downgrades all billing accounts whose subscriptions have expired to the Free tier"
sidebar_label: "Trigger subscription downgrade job"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/admin/cron/downgrade"}

Manually triggers the expired-subscription downgrade cron job. Downgrades all billing accounts whose subscriptions have expired to the Free tier
